testcase.name: gSender UI Load Test should navigate to gSender and verify the UI loads
testcase.classname: should navigate to gSender and verify the UI loads

testcase.name: Device Connection should connect to CNC machine by selecting the first available port
testcase.classname: should connect to CNC machine by selecting the first available port

testcase.name: Load file testing in grblHal Complete workflow: Connect-> Upload-> Disconnect->Upload-> Connect->Disconnect
testcase.classname: Complete workflow: Connect-> Upload-> Disconnect->Upload-> Connect->Disconnect

testcase.name: GrblHal Machine File Info Test Uploads file, toggles, and prints file info
testcase.classname: Uploads file, toggles, and prints file info

testcase.name: Gsender testing jogging using buttons Test Case: jogging using buttons
testcase.classname: Test Case: jogging using buttons

testsuite.name: Dynamic Keyboard Jogging Test - All Axes

testcase.name: Dynamic Keyboard Jogging Test - All Axes Test all keyboard jog shortcuts dynamically
testcase.classname: Test all keyboard jog shortcuts dynamically

testcase.name: Gsender testing preset create update Verify Rapid preset values are updated and jogging speed/position is accurate
testcase.classname: Verify Rapid preset values are updated and jogging speed/position is accurate

testsuite.name: Grblhal Zeroing axis and go to zero

testcase.name: Grblhal Zeroing axis and go to zero Test Case: jogging using buttons and zeroing axes
testcase.classname: Test Case: jogging using buttons and zeroing axes

testcase.name: CNC Visualizer rendering test case Connects to CNC, uploads file, and verifies visualizer + file info
testcase.classname: Connects to CNC, uploads file, and verifies visualizer + file info

testsuite.name: Job Run Test in grblHal without homing

testcase.name: Job Run Test in grblHal without homing Test Case: Connect, Upload File, Run Job and Collect Details
testcase.classname: Test Case: Connect, Upload File, Run Job and Collect Details

testcase.name: Coolant Testing Apply coolant mist, flood and Off option
testcase.classname: Apply coolant mist, flood and Off option

testcase.name: Feedrate Performance Comparison Test Should compare job completion times with different feedrates
testcase.classname: Should compare job completion times with different feedrates

testsuite.name: Macros Upload, Execution and Verification Test

testcase.name: Macros Upload, Execution and Verification Test Upload and run macro with success message verify the output
testcase.classname: Upload and run macro with success message verify the output

testcase.name: Console commands testing Connects machine and sets axes to zero
testcase.classname: Connects machine and sets axes to zero

testsuite.name: gSender Configuration and Firmware Test Suite

testcase.name: gSender Configuration and Firmware Test Suite Should reset, export, import gSender settings, restore firmware defaults, and perform searches
testcase.classname: Should reset, export, import gSender settings, restore firmware defaults, and perform searches

testcase.name: Gsender testing jogging using buttons Test Case: jogging using buttons
testcase.classname: Test Case: jogging using buttons

testsuite.name: Invert and Check Pins Test with Stepper Motor Lock/Unlock

testcase.name: Invert and Check Pins Test with Stepper Motor Lock/Unlock Checks machine information, verifies pin inversion, and tests stepper motor lock/unlock
testcase.classname: Checks machine information, verifies pin inversion, and tests stepper motor lock/unlock

testcase.name: gSender Movement tuning test Should complete movement tuning for x axis and y axis
testcase.classname: Should complete movement tuning for x axis and y axis

testcase.name: Rotary surfacing Rotary surfacing
testcase.classname: Rotary surfacing

testsuite.name: Spindle Configuration and Control Test - Decrease to 7500 RPM

testcase.name: Spindle Configuration and Control Test - Decrease to 7500 RPM Connect, Configure Spindle, Upload File, Decrease to 7500 RPM, Reset, Increase to 24000 RPM, and Complete Job
testcase.classname: Connect, Configure Spindle, Upload File, Decrease to 7500 RPM, Reset, Increase to 24000 RPM, and Complete Job

testcase.name: Surfacing Test Should complete surfacing workflow successfully
testcase.classname: Should complete surfacing workflow successfully

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 120000ms: Expected to find content: '/^Idle$/i' but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 120000ms: Expected to find content: '/^Idle$/i' but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://gSender/./cypress/e2e/grblHal/surfacing.cy.js:141:7)

testsuite.name: CNC Bit Position and Job Progress Tracking

testcase.name: CNC Bit Position and Job Progress Tracking should connect, track bit positions, verify movement, and validate specific position values during job execution
testcase.classname: should connect, track bit positions, verify movement, and validate specific position values during job execution
